mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_alert (user_id, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, target_price, cabin_class, notified, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{departureAirportCode}, #{arrivalAirportCode}, #{targetPrice}, #{cabinClass}, FALSE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, target_price, cabin_class, notified, created_at, updated_at FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND notified = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, target_price, cabin_class, notified, created_at, updated_at FROM price_alert WHERE notified = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE price_alert SET notified = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
